arguments.name: There are no input arguments for this command.

description: Check if an IP address is whitelisted: canarytools-check-whitelist
name: canarytools-list-canaries

outputs.description: Device description CanaryTools.Device.Address Device IP address
outputs.name: CanaryTools.Device.Description

outputs.description: Device status - Live (True/False) CanaryTools.Device.Location Device location
outputs.name: CanaryTools.Device.Status

outputs.description: CanaryTools.Device.LastUpdated date Device last updated time
outputs.name: Device last seen time
